title: CandidateRecord
description: One row in candidate_records.jsonl for multi-shot candidate selection (Issue #1475).

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the task being solved.

candidate_index.description: Zero-based index of this candidate within the task's shot pool.

model.description: Model identifier used to generate this candidate.

harness.description: Harness identifier used to run this candidate.

public_signals.description: Public verifier signals used for selection (lint, parse, test, etc.).

selected.description: True for the winner selected by public signals; false for all other candidates.

hidden_status.description: Hidden scoring result, present only after selection is frozen.
